### useLocaleName()

获取当前区域名称的 react hook

```typescript
useLocaleName: (propValue?: "de-DE" | "en-US" | "es-ES" | "fr-FR" | "id-ID" | "it-IT" | "ja-JP" | "ko-KR" | "pt-BR" | "ru-RU" | "th-TH" | "vi-VN" | "zh-CN" | "zh-HK" | "zh-TW" | "ms-MY" | undefined) => "de-DE" | "en-US" | "es-ES" | "fr-FR" | "id-ID" | "it-IT" | "ja-JP" | "ko-KR" | "pt-BR" | "ru-RU" | "th-TH" | "vi-VN" | "zh-CN" | "zh-HK" | "zh-TW" | "ms-MY"
```

#### useLocaleName的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  propValue | "de-DE" \| "en-US" \| "es-ES" \| "fr-FR" \| "id-ID" \| "it-IT" \| "ja-JP" \| "ko-KR" \| "pt-BR" \| "ru-RU" \| "th-TH" \| "vi-VN" \| "zh-CN" \| "zh-HK" \| "zh-TW" \| "ms-MY" \| undefined |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

"de-DE" \| "en-US" \| "es-ES" \| "fr-FR" \| "id-ID" \| "it-IT" \| "ja-JP" \| "ko-KR" \| "pt-BR" \| "ru-RU" \| "th-TH" \| "vi-VN" \| "zh-CN" \| "zh-HK" \| "zh-TW" \| "ms-MY"

返回当前区域名称

## Example

const locale = useLocaleName();
